name: Vegetable Cutlets
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Minced red or yellow pepper
1/2 lb Raw spinach, cleaned and chopped. (2 cups tightly packed. REMOVE STEMS
1 lb Potatoes (3 medium) boiled & mashed. (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the peppers in the olive oil until soft.
2. Add all the remaining ingredients, except the vegetable oil, to the pan with the sauted peppers.
3. Let the mixture stand for 30 minutes or overnight.
4. Bring the mixture to room temperature when ready to cook.
5. Use 1/4 cup of the mixture for each patty.
6. Drain the patties on paper towels before cooking.
7. Alternatively, place the patties on a lightly greased baking sheet and bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 10 minutes. Turn the patties and bake for another 7 to 10 minutes.
Makes about 40 patties.
